[HIGH] auth: Auth-related path changed
  Message: File 'app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php' matches path-classifier rule 'laravel.auth-controllers' for category 'auth'.
  File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php
  Detail: laravel.auth-controllers
  Recommendation: Auth-related code is a common source of access-control regressions. Review the change carefully, confirm a corresponding test exists, and verify behavior against your auth model before deploying.

[HIGH] auth: Auth-related path changed

  Detail: laravel.middleware
  Recommendation: Auth-related code is a common source of access-control regressions. Review the change carefully, confirm a corresponding test exists, and verify behavior against your auth model before deploying.

[HIGH] test-gap: Risky change without paired test: laravel.auth-controllers
  Message: Changes to app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php were not paired with a sibling test change in the same diff
  File: app/Http/Controllers/Auth/LoginController.php
  Detail: path-rule: laravel.auth-controllers
  Recommendation: Add or update sibling tests for this change in the same diff. Risky-area changes without paired test changes are difficult to verify and easy to regress. If the change is intentionally test-exempt (e.g., a pure config tweak), document the exemption in the change description.

[HIGH] test-gap: Risky change without paired test: laravel.middleware

  Detail: path-rule: laravel.middleware
  Recommendation: Add or update sibling tests for this change in the same diff. Risky-area changes without paired test changes are difficult to verify and easy to regress. If the change is intentionally test-exempt (e.g., a pure config tweak), document the exemption in the change description.
